query:
SELECT s.externalId, s.planName, s.serviceType, s.monthlyCost, s.supplierName, s.dataSource, s.serviceId
FROM services s
JOIN customers c ON c.externalId = s.customerExternalId
WHERE c.name LIKE '%Denim%'
ORDER BY s.serviceType, s.monthlyCost DESC;
command:
